name: Cheesy Fisherman's Grill
recipeIngredient: 2 Fresh tomatoes, skinned and de-seeded, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned salmon and reserve the juice. Mix the reserved juice with milk to make up to 150 ml (1/4 pint). Set aside.
2. Place the salmon and crab meat in a bowl.
3. Melt the butter in a pan and stir in the flour.
4. Gradually add the fish and milk stock, stirring to create a smooth sauce.
5. Add the chopped tomatoes and parsley, then season well.
6. Mix the sauce into the crab and salmon mixture.
7. Spoon the mixture into two individual serving dishes.
8. Sprinkle Parmesan over the top of the salmon mixture.
9. Place under a moderate grill for 6-8 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown.
10. Serve garnished with two or three crab legs and new potatoes.
Serves 2. Approx 535 kcals per serving
